core_mechanism: a spin-glass-type rugged energy landscape arising from frustrated competition among many heterogeneous interacting units, yielding many metastable states so the system endures long quasi-stationary epochs punctuated by abrupt avalanche-like transitions and displays hypersensitivity to small perturbations
brief_reason: The abstract explicitly invokes spin-glass problems where the combination of competition and heterogeneities generically produces long epochs of stasis interrupted by crises and hyper-sensitivity to small changes of the environment.
